summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of NEW Quick Create page (/quick-create). All 16 test features passed 100%. Quick Create flow (Steps 1-3) works correctly: product form, toggle buttons, existing products list, video description with quick prompts, resolution/duration selectors, and video generation initiation. Home page CTA and navbar updates verified.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_QuickCreate Product during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Create page fully tested. Step 4 (Review) cannot be tested in automated tests as video generation takes 2-5 minutes. Manual verification may be needed for Step 4 review flow. Sora 2 API is REAL (not mocked). The database has 1 product 'Health Supplement Bundle' and multiple completed/processing videos.
